title: Expressions, Control Flow, Iteration, Switches, and Deferred Work · Runtime Contract: Defer Order Capture
summary: A retry policy must classify states, bound attempts, accumulate evidence, and guarantee cleanup across early returns. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go defer order capture increment in a bounded retry and classification engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict deferred-call argument capture, last-in-first-out execution, named-result interaction, and cleanup timing.
Choose expression switches, type switches, labeled control, and select only when their matching and termination behavior is explicit.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
